title: Banneker Partners Closes Continuation Fund
content:
## Banneker Partners Closes Continuation Fund
McCarthy advised Banneker Partners on the closing of a continuation fund, with a team led by Robert Hansen (Business) that included Michael Shahinian, Alykhan Rahim (Business), Debbie Salzberger ( Antitrust/Competition & Foreign Investment), Patrick McCay, Kabir Jamal (Tax), and Angela Lizotte (senior securities law clerk). Banneker Partners, LLC is a San Francisco based firm that is composed of top-tier professionals in investment, operations, and business development, all possessing extensive software expertise.
